name: Void Spirit
description: Friend or foe, in the wake of the confluence, you will follow where I lead. Inai, the Void Spirit Not even the other spirits claim to understand the mind and machinations of the eldest amongst them, Inai the Void Spirit.

abilities.name: Intrinsic Edge
abilities.description: Grants Inai additional secondary bonuses from all attributes.

abilities.name: Aether Remnant
abilities.description: Grants True Sight centered around the Remnant, and creates an additional watcher path that rotates around the remnant. Enemy creeps within the Remnant's path no longer destroys the remnant, but deals damage per second to them corresponding to the total damage value.

abilities.name: Dissimilate
abilities.description: Temporarily fades into the aether, creating a number of portals through which Inai can reassemble himself. Deals damage to all enemy units within the portal radius upon exit. Creates additional portals with the same radius behind the first ring portals.

abilities.name: Resonant Pulse
abilities.description: Swiftly creates a physical damage barrier and emits a single damaging pulse around Inai. Now applies silences to all affected enemy units, and is now a charged-based ability with a replenish time.

abilities.name: Astral Step
abilities.description: Tears a rift through the astral plane to appear at the target location, slicing all enemy units along the path. This attack inflicts a void debuff that applies a movement speed slow, and then detonates. A small step for Inai creates great devastation on the mortal plane.
